expectations.text: Auth preflight is reported as successful for the execution profile
Notebook listing is reported with a non-zero count
MCP-first attempt and CLI fallback/path decision is documented
Response uses structured contract fields (status and path_used)

uncertainties: Subagent completion notifications in this environment did not expose duration/tokens telemetry.
workarounds: Stored timing/tokens as 0.0/0 due missing telemetry fields in tool response.
